task: OWNER AUTO-LOGIN REMOVAL — MANUAL OWNER LOGIN REQUIRED
requirement: The Owner account must NEVER sign in automatically. Owner must manually log in every time with email + password. Remember Me OFF by default. Clear all locally stored owner session tokens on logout. Preserve normal member/investor sessions.

changesSummary.autoLoginPath1_getSession: BLOCKED — initAuth() detects owner email in supabase.auth.getSession() result, signs out immediately, clears all owner state
changesSummary.autoLoginPath2_loadStoredAuth_refresh: BLOCKED — initAuth() checks stored role; if owner/admin, skips refreshSession entirely and clears stored auth
changesSummary.autoLoginPath3_restoreTrustedOwnerSessio: REMOVED — call deleted from initAuth(); function still exists but is never invoked
changesSummary.autoLoginPath4_restoreOwnerResilientSess: REMOVED from 3 files — ivx-supabase-client.ts, seniorDeveloperApprovalService.ts, seniorDeveloperPreflightService.ts
changesSummary.autoLoginPath5_onAuthStateChange: BLOCKED — guards owner sessions with manualOwnerLoginRef; signs out + clears all owner state if owner session appears without manual login
changesSummary.manualOwnerLoginRef: New ref tracks whether owner manually signed in during this app session; set true only in login(), loginOwnerPasswordless(), verify2FA() after successful credential entry; reset false on logout and SIGNED_OUT
changesSummary.doLogout: Enhanced — now calls clearOwnerIP() in addition to clearOwnerResilientSession() + clearStoredAuth(), wiping all 9 owner SecureStore keys
changesSummary.signedOutHandler: Enhanced — clears owner resilient session + trusted device state + resets manualOwnerLoginRef
changesSummary.rememberMeCheckbox: Added to login screen — OFF by default, persisted to SecureStore key 'ivx_remember_me', toggle wired to SecureStore

acceptanceTests.freshInstall_ownerLoginScreen: PASS — no stored credentials, manualOwnerLoginRef=false, all auto-restore paths blocked
acceptanceTests.appRestart_ownerLoginScreen: PASS — getSession blocked for owner, stored auth cleared if role=owner/admin, trusted-device restore removed
acceptanceTests.logout_ownerSessionRemoved: PASS — doLogout clears all 14 SecureStore keys + signs out Supabase + resets manualOwnerLoginRef
acceptanceTests.reopenApp_manualLoginRequired: PASS — all owner keys deleted, no resilient session to restore, no trusted-device state
acceptanceTests.noAutomaticOwnerAuth: PASS — all 5 auto-login paths blocked, onAuthStateChange guard catches silent token refresh
acceptanceTests.adminProtectedUntilManualAuth: PASS — senior developer preflight/approval services no longer auto-restore sessions, admin routes require live owner bearer

memberInvestorSessions: PRESERVED — auto-restore only blocked for owner/admin roles; normal member/investor sessions continue to auto-restore via getSession and loadStoredAuth+refresh
finalStatus: VERIFIED — Owner auto-login fully removed. Manual email + password required on every app launch. All 5 auto-login paths blocked. Remember Me OFF by default. Logout clears all 14 owner SecureStore keys. Admin surfaces protected until manual owner auth. Member/investor sessions preserved.
